title: verbascum × calcicola
intro: Verbascum × calcicola, also known as calcified mullein, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × calcicola include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × calcicola include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, topical creams, and other remedies for various health issues.
